name: Travel During Recovery Boise

mainEntity.name: Can I travel out of state during comp recovery Boise ID?
mainEntity.text: Can I travel out of state during comp recovery Boise ID?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, but notify insurer, continue approved treatment. Travel doesn't void claim unless fraud.

suggestedAnswer.text: Boise: document medical compliance. Insurers surveil; attorney advises on restrictions, counters surveillance disputes.

description: Yes, but notify insurer, continue approved treatment. Travel doesn't void claim unless fraud.
